response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'オーバード' and the composer '柊キライ' from the lower third of the video at 00:09. Verified the song is 'オーバード' by Hiiragi Kirai, with Takane Lui being a prominent original performer. The VTubers performing in the video are identified as Ichijou Ririka and Todoroki Hajime, who are members of Hololive's ReGLOSS, joined later by Tokoyami Towa. Performed a search for '"オーバード" "柊キライ" Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve the official lyrics and translation. The music ends at 03:29.
response.global_summary: A dynamic virtual concert performance of the song 'オーバード' (Overd) by Hiiragi Kirai, performed by Hololive VTubers Ichijou Ririka and Todoroki Hajime, with a special guest appearance by Tokoyami Towa at the end.

scenes.description: The performance of 'オーバード' begins with Ichijou Ririka and Todoroki Hajime on stage, with the song title 'オーバード' and composer '柊キライ' appearing on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ichijou Ririka and Todoroki Hajime (feat. Tokoyami Towa)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
四六時中 帰りの会で面倒くささを押し付けられている
何から何まで 私語は止めて まとめ役なら
聞くを上手にうなずきあっている
なかよしこよしで さあ だまれ だまりたまえよ
言えないねそんな強い言葉は
少しだけ静かにしてほしいな
ああ 私たち待望へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
All day long, I am burdened with annoyance during the homeroom meeting.
From start to finish, stop the private chatter.
If I'm the one in charge, I'll nod skillfully while listening.
We're like best friends, so come on, shut up, be quiet.
I can't say such strong words.
I want you to be quiet for just a little while.
Ah, we are waiting for our future.
